name: Asimilar Group Plc
summary: Asimilar Group Plc, an investment company, focuses on investing in the technology, travel, leisure, and media sectors. The company offers various end-to-end technology services eco-system, including a range of multi-platform TV and video distribution products, such as low latency online simulcasts of TV channels, real-time sports highlights clipping, broadcaster catch-up services, social video syndication, and subscriber management services to broadcasters and rights owners. It also provides multi-channel, multi-territory frontend templated applications for a range of connected devices comprising mobiles, tablets, connected TVs, and over the top platforms that include Amazon Fire TV, Apple TV, and Roku, as well as Hybrid TV solutions to power catchup services on Freeview, Freesat, YouView, and EETV for various broadcasters. In addition, the company offers TVPlayer, a next generation pay TV platform that provides live, catch-up, on demand, and Pay Per View services, as well as streams approximately 98 TV channels; and TVPlayer Plus, a TV Broadcast platform, as well as ITV Box Office, a pay-per-view service that includes the World Boxing Super Series. Further, it provides GFinity, an end-to-end eSports solution, which offers online competitions and content to engage the eSports community; technology and services to the eSports market; and spoken-word audio or podcasting platforms for hosting, distributing, and monetizing content that enables the creation, broadcast, and syndication of audio content across various networks and geographies, as well as engages in the music entertainment technology business. The company was formerly known as Yolo Leisure and Technology plc and changed its name to Asimilar Group Plc in December 2019. Asimilar Group Plc was incorporated in 2002 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
